title: Delicate American Prune Stew
description: A romantic American dish featuring fermented prunes, cooked to perfection in a scallop shell clay pot, perfect for a special occasion. This kosher-friendly recipe is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Chop the onion, carrots, and potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
Mince the garlic and mix with thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped vegetables, garlic mixture, and fermented prunes to the scallop shell clay pot.
Pour in the beef broth, making sure that all the ingredients are covered.
Cover the clay pot with a lid and bake for 2 hours.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
Let the stew cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
